title: 12 PCS Red and White Christmas Tree Decorations, Candy Canes christmas tree decor, Plastic Glitter Pendant Hanging with Rope, christmas tree Baubles red white Ornaments for Xmas Home decor
features: 🎄 【Candy Cane-Themed Christmas Decorations】The christmas decorations - red candy cane made of durable plastic with a smooth, glossy surface and shimmering white glitter, these ornaments add a festive sparkle to any setting.
🎅【Two Sizes】 Includes 12 candy cane decorations in 2 sizes (6 pieces each): approx. 12cm x 1.5cm and 13cm x 1.1cm. Ideal for decorating Christmas trees and more.
✨ 【Elegant Details】Each candy cane christmas tree decorations features glitter accents, a golden top, and a matching gold hanging loop – a stylish and classic choice for your festive décor.
🎅 【Classic Holiday Style】With traditional red-and-white colors, these hanging christmas tree candy canes complement any Christmas theme and bring charm to your holiday party.
🎄 【Versatile Holiday Decor】Hang them on trees, potted plants, mantels, doors, windows, walls, ceilings, or stair railings – a delightful touch for your Christmas home atmosphere.
description: Product Description 12pcs Glitter Candy Canes Christmas Tree Decorations Bring festive sparkle to your home with this classic Christmas tree decoration set! You will receive 12 beautiful candy canes for your Christmas tree in a sparkling red and white design – the perfect addition to your Christmas tree decorations. Each christmas tree decorations candy cane features a glittering spiral structure that elegantly reflects the light. Thanks to the included ribbons, the pendants are easy to hang – ideal for those who want to decorate quickly and stylishly.
